response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep distributed systems experience, strong Python/TypeScript proficiency, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq — aligning closely with the role’s AI-native engineering requirements. His ownership mindset, operational experience with on-call systems, and stakeholder coordination across startups and global teams further support fit. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of Python mastery and absence of formal agile role leadership, but these are outweighed by his proven technical depth and agentic workflow involvement.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Proven track record in high-throughput distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong full-stack ownership and operational readiness across startups and global teams
concerns: Resume emphasizes TypeScript/Node.js more than Python — depth in Python not explicitly detailed
No clear evidence of rotating scrum champion or formal agile ceremony leadership
German language skill is basic, may limit collaboration in Berlin-based team
